expectations.text: Response contains required substrings (InsertError, raise_err=True, ProbeType).
Response does not contain forbidden substrings (reinsert=True before, should super_delete).
expectations.evidence: Forbidden substrings absent verbatim. Response actively warns against both.

expectations.text: Inspects common_usage.InsertError first (with the session's nwb_file_name restriction)
expectations.evidence: Section 1: 'Read what populate_all_common already recorded' — `(InsertError & {nwb_file_name: 'j1620210710_.nwb'}).fetch(as_dict=True)` framed as 'before doing anything else'.

expectations.text: Mentions missing Probe rows often indicate upstream DataAcquisitionDevice / ProbeType dependency
expectations.evidence: Section 2 'Expect the failure to be upstream of Probe, not on Probe itself': 'when you see missing Probe rows, the bug is almost always one level up — typically ProbeType, occasionally DataAcquisitionDevice'.
